title: Creamy Dutch Pasta
description: A rich and indulgent pasta dish with a Dutch twist, featuring a creamy sauce and al dente pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the mascarpone cheese and stir until smooth.
Add the heavy cream and stir until heated through.
Season with thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
Drain the cooked pasta and return it to the pot.
Add the creamy sauce and toss until the pasta is well coated.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with Parmesan cheese.
